rulings.Case Title: KEVIN TROMPETER et al VS. AC AND S, INC. et al
rulings.Rulings: ON CALENDAR FOR FRIDAY, OCTOBER 6, 2006. DEFENDANT KELSEY-HAYES COMPANY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF FAILS TO PRESENT ANY ADMISSIBLE EVIDENCE OF EXPOSURE TO DEFENDANT'S PRODUCT. NOT ENOUGH THAT DEFENDANT WAS A NON-EXCLUSIVE SUPPLIER TO MANUFACTURERS WHOSE PRODUCTS PLAINTIFF HANDLED. =(302/JUDGE BUSCH/pb)
